title: BirchBoat
description: BirchBoat is a modern modpack that includes many fps boosting mods and QoL essentials.
body:
# Why BirchBoat?

Minecraft is one of the worst optimized games of all time, thanks to modding, we can fix that and have a smoother experience. With this pack you can get up to 4 times as much fps as you would with vanilla minecraft.

## What does birchboat do?
birchboat includes many popular optimization mods like sodium or lithium by default + some more specific and less known mods to get even more performance.
